abstract: Returns an array of elements that contain the parsed data from the HID device’s report.
overview:
## Return Value

An array of [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement] objects containing the parsed data from the report.

## Discussion

Use this method to get the array of [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement] objects that contain the data for the most recent device report. Each element contains data for a single aspect of the device’s state. For example, a report from a stylus contains separate elements for the horizontal and vertical position of the stylus, the pressure values, and so on. Use the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getUsagePage] and [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getUsage] methods of the element to determine the type of information in each element.

This method creates a new set of [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement] objects the first time you call it. On subequent calls, it updates the existing [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement] objects with data from the most recent report.

# getElements

**Instance Method**

Returns an array of elements that contain the parsed data from the HID device’s report.

## Declaration

```swift
OSArray * getElements();
```

## Return Value

An array of [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement] objects containing the parsed data from the report.

## Discussion

Use this method to get the array of [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement] objects that contain the data for the most recent device report. Each element contains data for a single aspect of the device’s state. For example, a report from a stylus contains separate elements for the horizontal and vertical position of the stylus, the pressure values, and so on. Use the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getUsagePage] and [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getUsage] methods of the element to determine the type of information in each element.

This method creates a new set of [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement] objects the first time you call it. On subequent calls, it updates the existing [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement] objects with data from the most recent report.

## Responding to Input Reports

- **handleReport**: Converts an incoming device report into dispatchable events.
- **ReportAvailable**: Notifies the event service that an updated report is available from the HID device.
